creator: ohauer@gmx.de
text:
On 2010-06-27 00:59, Philip M. Gollucci wrote:
 > On 6/26/2010 6:57 PM, olli hauer wrote:
 >>> I'm also not too sure that renaming the patchfiles is necessary -- is
 >>> it possible to just fix the tool to deal with this case?
 >>>
 >>> mcl
 >>>
 >>
 >> Hm, no problem.
 >> I got the Idea to rename the patchfiles from the FreeBSD wiki.
 > We try not to do it for cvs history reasons.  There are a few reasons to
 > do it however:
 >   1) request a reopcopy; typical 1 is not worth the effort.
 >   2) the patches have piled up and new patches are non trivial to
 >      make or conflict
 
 Ok, this is a valid reason.
 
 
 >> If you like I create a second patch for the port, and change only
 >> the PORTVERSION in Makefile.common and the distinfo.
 >> There is nothing else to change for the update to 1.6.12.
 > yes please.  The same pr will be fine.
 > 
 
 A new patch is on the way, a quick build in tinderbox was OK.
